boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the legal operator execute the filing, disclosure, or contract action now? Focus: SEC disclosure draft filing.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No source record closes the action boundary

final_answer: The action may not proceed. Source records show the required dependency for disclosure committee approval and filing version match remains open. Execution requires exact boundary closure per policy.
